items.headline: America didn’t give Elon Musk a trillion dollars. He earned every penny

items.headline: SpaceX Stock Jumps 11% in Premarket Trading as Momentum Builds After Record-Breaking IPO
items.summary: SpaceX shares soared 11% in premarket trading following its record-breaking IPO, driven by strong investor demand and ambitious growth plans in space exploration and AI.
